name: Celestial Aphelion (Java + Node + Python)
postCreateCommand: bash -c "source /usr/local/sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh && yes | sdk install java 21.0.2-tem && yes | sdk install java 25.0.2-tem" && sudo curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sudo env UV_INSTALL_DIR="/usr/local/bin" sh && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend-python && uv sync --no-dev
